verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُدَّثِّرُ
verses.text: You, cloaked one!
Arise and warn!
Magnify your Lord,
and purify your clothes,
and flee from the defilement!
Do not confer a favor to gain more,
and be patient before your Lord.
When there is a blast on the trumpet,
that Day will be a hard Day
– far from easy on the disbelievers.
Leave Me (to deal with) him whom I created alone,
and for whom I supplied extensive wealth,
and sons as witnesses,
and made everything smooth for him.
Then he is eager that I should do more.
By no means! He is stubborn to Our signs.
I shall burden him with a hard climb.
Surely he thought and decided –
so may he perish (for) how he decided!
Once again, may he perish (for) how he decided!
Then he looked,
then he frowned and scowled,
then he turned back and became arrogant,

verses.quran_arabic: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌۭ يُؤْثَرُ
verses.text: and said, ‘This is nothing but ordinary magic.
This is nothing but the word of a human being.’
I shall burn him in Saqar!
And what will make you know what Saqar is?
It spares nothing, and leaves nothing,
scorching all flesh.
Over it are nineteen.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنَآ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَٰٓئِكَةًۭ ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةًۭ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَيَزْدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِيمَٰنًۭا ۙ وَلَا يَرْتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌۭ وَٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلًۭا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَمَا هِىَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: We have made only angels as keepers of the Fire, and We have made their number only as a test for the disbelievers, so that those who have been given the Book may be certain, and that those who believe may increase in belief, and that those who have been given the Book and those who believe may not be in doubt, and that those in whose hearts is a sickness and the disbelievers may say, ‘What did God intend by this as a parable?’ In this way God leads astray whomever He pleases and guides whomever He pleases. No one knows the (angelic) forces of your Lord but Him. It is nothing but a reminder to humankind.
By no means! By the moon,
and the night when it retreats,
and the morning when it brightens!
Surely it is indeed one of the greatest things
– a warning to humankind –

verses.quran_arabic: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
verses.text: to whoever of you pleases to go forward or lag behind.
Each person (is held) in pledge for what he has earned,
except for the companions on the right.
In Gardens they will ask each other questions
about the sinners:
‘What put you into Saqar?’
They will say, ‘We were not among the ones who prayed,
and we did not feed the poor,
and we bantered with the banterers,
and we called the Day of Judgment a lie,
until the certainty came to us.’
The intercession of the intercessors will not benefit them.
What is (the matter) with them, turning away from the Reminder,
as if they were frightened donkeys

canonical_variants.english: as though they were donkeys made to panic
as though they were donkeys made to panic

verses.text: fleeing from a lion?

verses.quran_arabic: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًۭا مُّنَشَّرَةًۭ
verses.text: No! Each one of them wants to be given scrolls unrolled.
By no means! No! They do not fear the Hereafter.
By no means! Surely it is a reminder,
and whoever pleases takes heed of it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ
verses.text: But they will not take heed unless God pleases. He is worthy of guarding (oneself) against, and worthy of (dispensing) forgiveness.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمَا تَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّا أَنْ يَّشَآءَ اَ۬للَّهُۖ هُوَ أَهْلُ اُ۬لتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ اُ۬لْمَغْفِرَةِۖ
canonical_variants.english: Yet youpl will not remember unless

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمَا تَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَنْ يَّشَآءَ اَ۬للَّهُۖ هُوَ أَهْلُ اُ۬لتَّقْو۪ىٰ وَأَهْلُ اُ۬لْمَغْفِرَةِۖ
canonical_variants.english: Yet youpl will not remember unless
